info.title: MotionTools API
info.description: API for managing delivery logistics including user management, bookings, tours, driver management, organizations, services, and capabilities.

post.summary: Dispatch or move stops into an existing tour

post.description: Optimizes a route based on existing and custom stops, returning the optimal order.
Estimates arrival times and distances for a set of stops.

get.description: Returns the driver experience configuration for tour requests.

patch.description: Updates the driver experience configuration for tour requests.

get.description: Returns the tour display configuration for driver apps.

put.description: Updates the tour display configuration for driver apps.

get.description: Retrieves a document that was generated asynchronously.

bearerAuth.description: Access token obtained via sign in or API token authentication
